chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3914 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For orders on CMA No.18325/2025. (Restoration) 27.10.2025 Mr. Raja Sanaullah Khan, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Saima Imdad, AAG. ------------- Vide order dated 02.09.2025, the instant petition was dismissed for non-prosecution. The said order is reproduced below for ease of reference:- “This is an old petition of 2023, which is over two years ago. It was last taken up on 22.09.2023, when none was present for the petitioner and a week’s time was allowed for compliance. Today, it is fixed for non-prosecution as compliance has not been made in the last two years. It reveals that the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition in the last two years. Today, once again, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. Petitioner is present in person and when he has been asked to argue his case, he refused to do the same. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application.” Based on the restoration application and in light of the above- reproduced order, we find no ground to restore this petition, as the said order clearly reflects the petitioner’s complete lack of interest in pursuing this petition. Accordingly, this restoration application is dismissed. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
